name: Color Cannon Game
description: Color Cannon is a free online ball game for boys played on PuzzleGame. Use your finger to move various platforms and objects, and choose the correct flight trajectory of the colored balls to shoot all the balls and fill the glass. The further you go, the harder the game will get. Can you pass them all? Play on Mobile, Tablet, or Desktop.
tags: 3D, Android, Avoid, Ball, Bounce, Boy, Brain, Color, Fun, HTML5, Kids, Obstacle, Online, Physics, Puzzle, Shooting, Skill
